final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing avatar icon for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital gadgets, and lifestyle products — suitable for both Chinese and international social platforms.

Style/medium: clean flat vector illustration, icon-grade simplicity, modern tech-lifestyle aesthetic
Subject: a compact symbolic composition combining a sleek EV silhouette, a small digital device (phone or earbuds), and a lifestyle accent (e.g. a leaf or spark), unified into one cohesive mark with balanced negative space
Composition: centered square-safe layout with generous padding, icon readable at 200×200 px thumbnail size
Color palette: electric blue as dominant brand color, soft white as background, a single warm accent (amber or mint green) for the lifestyle element — no red-green-only combinations that may cause accessibility issues
Constraints: must work as a circular crop (common on social platforms); no human faces, no religious symbols, no national flags, no culturally specific gestures; monochrome version must remain legible
Avoid: gradients that muddy at small sizes, overly complex line art, photorealistic textures, culturally divisive imagery, generic Behance flat-icon clichés, stuffer aesthetics
